title: AGENTS.md cross-link README NM-5 domain pack section
problem: Ticket-123 documented NM-5 domain pack runtime loading in README Operator Quickstart, but AGENTS.md operator spine does not point operators to the pack file table or overlap-domain claim rules.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md Operator Quickstart references README NM-5 domain pack section.
AGENTS.md lists overlap-domain claim label rule in one sentence with README link.
Golden tests and full pytest remain green.
non_goals: No README content duplication beyond a short AGENTS.md pointer.
No pack loader or validator code changes.
No public site or schema changes.
